summary: Implemented the attached Create Profile sync/proxy plan without modifying the plan file. I moved `Start URL` into `GeneralTab`, seeded and expanded Overview sync to include start URL, group, tags, and richer proxy state, kept UI changes within the existing control system, rebuilt the Network tab proxy section to support custom vs saved proxy flows with visible protocol handling and backend `proxy.check`, improved location autofill with GPS-first/IP fallback, changed Create Profile payload assembly so saved proxies persist via `ProxyId` while custom proxies persist inline in `Fingerprint.Proxy`, normalized proxy type handling in backend services, and updated the Overview `New` fingerprint action so it writes randomized values back into the tab state while preserving current platform/model. I then checked all edited files for diagnostics and they are lint-clean.
current_status: The Create Profile modal is now substantially more aligned with the requested UX and persistence model: `Start URL` lives in General & OS, Overview stays synchronized, custom vs saved proxies are separated in payload persistence, proxy types normalize to http/https/socks4/socks5 handling paths, and the New fingerprint flow updates real controls instead of only the summary.
